zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Somery於1256年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾厄普頓 馬尼亞時，她的父親Ralph de Somery25歲，母親Nichola25歲。她於1276年與Guillaume FitzWarin在英國英格蘭史洛普爾厄普頓 馬尼亞結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1316年3月5日在她的家鄉享年60歲。

nameMeanings.name: Somery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Somery was born in 1256, in Upton Magna, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Ralph de Somery, was 25 and her mother, Nichola, was 25. She married Guillaume FitzWarin in 1276, in Upton Magna, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 5 March 1316, in her hometown, at the age of 60.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Someryが1256年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアウプトン マグナで生まれた時，父Ralph de Someryは25歳，母Nicholaは25歳であった。1276年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアウプトン マグナでGuillaume FitzWarinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1316年3月5日に故郷で60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Somery(이)가 1256년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 업턴 매그나에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph de Somery(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Nichola(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1276년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 업턴 매그나에서 Guillaume FitzWarin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1316년 3월 5일 그녀의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.
